name: Lemon Poppy Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar at medium speed of electric mixer until fluffy, scraping the bowl often.
4. Add egg beaters, lemon juice, and substitute; beat well.
5. Add flour mixture alternately with sour cream, vanilla; beat at low speed until blended. Fold in poppy seeds and lemon zest.
6. Fill muffin cups lined with paper baking cups 2/3 full. Sprinkle tops with additional granulated sugar.
7. Bake in a 375°F oven for 18 to 20 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
